artifact.source:
root = Card([diffViewer], "server.ts Diff", "Changes between HEAD~1 and HEAD", "lg")
diffResult = Query("git_diff", {file: "repo/src/server.ts", base: "HEAD~1"}, {file: "repo/src/server.ts", before: "", after: ""})
diffViewer = DiffViewer(diffResult.file, diffResult.before, diffResult.after, "typescript", "none")
